name: Oven-Baked Crab Cakes - the Sea Grill
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Jumbo lump crab meat, picked over
recipeInstructions:
1. Pulse cornflakes in a food processor until finely ground and spread in a shallow baking pan.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together mayonnaise, mustard, Old Bay seasoning, Cayenne, and egg yolks. Mix in crab meat, salt, and pepper to taste.
3. Form the mixture into slightly flattened rounds about 2 1/2 inches wide and 3/4 inch thick.
4. Coat each crab cake with cornflakes by gently pressing the crushed cornflakes onto the top of the cakes.
5. Transfer coated crab cakes to a wax-paper-lined baking sheet. Chill for at least 2 hours, up to 4 hours.
6. Preheat oven to 400°F.
7. Place about 1/2 teaspoon of butter on each crab cake and bake in the middle of the oven until crisp and cooked through, about 15 minutes.
8. Serve crab cakes with tartar sauce. Makes about 20 crab cakes.
